content: Hi, I'm still fairly new and I seem to have had pretty decent luck so far on the banners I've been pulling on. I have ghelot at e3, and thais at e2. I've included all the other characters I've pulled so far. the characters I selected for the rate up banner are ghelot, thais, horla and hameln.  I'm not sure which banner to pull on now since I've hit e3 ghelot and e2 thais, which seem to be decent stopping points for them. Should I save my pulls for now, or continue pulling on one of the rateup banners? I was thinking of getting a copy of gdoll atleast, e0. Not sure what to focus on.

Additionally I was curious if I should replace Faint with Leigh or Horla in my main team.
my main team is ghelot, thais, faint and aigis.
I also have a subteam of Kathigu-ra,  Horla, Winkle and Hameln, specifically for clearing  ultra lightless realms,  and I was wondering if there's  a better comp I could assemble there.
+guides

Please be sure to check out our <#1304022827824844842>  section! Here are a few resources, tips, and walkthroughs to help you master the game:


- [Morimens Compendium](<https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1TCU7LJRzqKeuvLe97y_TfGZ-j6jq5bZX6hskAAJ2mFQ/edit?gid=167686509#gid=167686509>) by Mythag University

kath team is ok
main team looks good, i dont think horla is necessary
leigh may be nice quality of life, whether u prefer her or faint is personal preference
and stage dependent
makes sense. I appreciate the help. I'll stick with faint for now as I like her gameplay better with her counter, I'm doing good on sustain for now.

kath is one of the best carries for new players, if your criteria for pulling is "must be better than kath" u are never going to pull any banners ever
for your team, agrippa doesnt make much sense, i would swap her with aigis, and i would also use R wheels instead of SR wheels
you should continue pulling on moonless
why isnt tulu like tentacle generator for early story mode

Hello, I'm a new player who has only been playing for a week, though I only started playing more seriously these past 3 days. I've just finished Chapter 2 and I am currently doing the Wanda event (finished all the lv.10), as well as reaching Keeper lv. 25.

As of right now this is my roster. I am kinda lucky in the sense that I managed to pull 6 of the older limited characters from the standard banner (Tawil, Thais, Hameln, Daffodil, Helot:Catena and Miryam). I rolled for Salvador because I love old men. I wanted to pull on the Moonless/Self select banner but I made the mistake of choosing the characters right after I started playing and right now I already have 3 of the 4 chosen characters (only Horla left), so I don't think pulling on that banner is an efficient choice for me.

Is it better to run a mono-realm teams or dual realm? I'm progressing the story with Hameln - Tawil - Miryam - Sanga (or Faros) team because I liked their designs lol and Aequor is easy to play. I have quite a lot of Caro characters (so far I really dig the designs of Caro characters) but I need to learn on how to play them. I haven't built or touched the Ultra characters other than leveling Daffodil up. And should I started pulling more on the WoD banners? Thank you!
https://docs.google.com/document/d/1THjxR9hHs4NWHqSWHHa2dHAGuE_cRGelfzXdBfCnIlM/edit?usp=drivesdk
